headline: Southern (SO) And The Valuation Case After Its Data Center Growth Story
summary: Southern (SO) has drawn investor interest after its stock closed at $95.61, prompting closer attention to how its recent returns, earnings profile, and dividend-oriented utility model fit into broader portfolio decisions. See our latest analysis for Southern. Recent trading has been mixed for Southern, with a modest 1-day share price return of 0.46% and a 7-day share price decline of 2.42%.
